productDisplayName: Puma Men ferrari Black Polo Tshirts
description: CompositionBlack polo short sleeved t-shirt made of 35% cotton and 65% polyester, that has green-white-red fabric tape on the ribbing on the neckline, chequered pattern all over, the ferrari logo appliquéd on the left chest and right sleeve, and puma's logo appliquéd on the back of the neckFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in lukewarm water at 40 degreesDo not bleachTumble dry at low temperatureWarm ironDo not dry cleanSport this black t-shirt from puma, and all your friends will know a Ferrari fan is in their midst. The Ferrari logo looks regal on the chest, and the chequered pattern on the back reminds everyone of the Formula One flag. This red hot tee looks best with jeans and cool shoes. It's time to race!Model StatisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
